overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking along a mountain trail. The clip shows a continuous journey from an open rocky ridge with panoramic distant mountain views down into a densely forested area with increasing tree cover and shifting lighting conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge with panoramic vistas

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the mountain ridge path, moving toward the distant tree line with swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small stones
massive weathered rock formation beside the path
blue-hued mountain peaks visible in the far distance under hazy sky
tall evergreen trees dotting the hillside
golden-brown tall grass growing alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide mountain ridge with Geralt walking along a dirt path. Large gray boulders and scattered pine trees dot the landscape, while distant mountain ranges are visible under a clear morning sky. The terrain is open and exposed with sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail transitioning into forest edge

events.description: path enters denser tree cover with vegetation closing in from both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the winding path as the environment transitions from open ridge to mixed woodland

entered.detail: thick cluster of leafy green trees beginning to enclose the path
overhead tree cover starting to filter the sunlight

segments.scene_description: The trail descends slightly into a transitional zone where open mountain terrain gives way to forest. Dense deciduous trees begin enclosing the path from both sides, filtering the sunlight. The distant mountain views fade from sight as the canopy closes overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with shaded path

events.description: lighting shifts dramatically to deep forest shade as canopy fully covers the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the dimly lit forest interior, navigating the narrow winding trail surrounded by dense vegetation

entered.detail: tall tree trunks forming walls on both sides of the narrow path
thick ferns and shrubs filling the forest floor
boulders covered in green moss scattered among the trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters the deep forest where tall trees form enclosing walls on both sides of the narrow path. The lighting shifts to deep shade under the dense canopy, with mossy rocks and thick underbrush lining the trail. The environment feels enclosed and sheltered compared to the open ridge at the start.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an open, windswept mountain ridge gradually transforms into a secluded, deep forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path across an exposed landscape of gray boulders and scattered pines under a clear morning sky. As the trail descends, the open terrain gives way to a transitional zone where deciduous trees begin to enclose the path, filtering the sunlight and obscuring the distant mountain views. The scene then shifts into a dense woodland where tall trees form enclosing walls and the lighting fades into deep shade. Finally, the environment becomes fully sheltered, with the narrow path now lined by mossy rocks and thick underbrush.
